overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character walking through a snowy mountain canyon at dusk. The environment features rocky terrain, blowing snow particles, and an orange-lit sky, creating a dark fantasy atmosphere reminiscent of games like Dark Souls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy canyon with high rock walls

events.description: gust of wind blows snow particles through the canyon

agents.ego_description: armored character walking steadily through the narrow canyon with round shield on back, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall covered in snow and ice
tall dark rock formation with snow drifts
snowy ground trail winding through the canyon
jagged mountain silhouettes against the orange sky
glowing orange dusk sky with falling snow particles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, snow-filled canyon with high rock walls flanking both sides. The armored character walks steadily forward along the snowy path, with an orange dusk sky visible above and distant mountain peaks ahead. Wind blows snow particles through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain pass with panoramic vista

events.description: canyon walls recede as the path opens to wider mountain terrain with expansive sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the environment opens up, revealing expansive mountain ranges ahead

entered.detail: snowy mountain ridge becoming visible directly ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character exits the narrow canyon section, the terrain opens into a wider mountain pass with full visibility of the orange sky. The canyon walls recede into the distance while new snow-covered ridges come into view ahead. The character continues walking forward through the deepening snow toward the distant peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive, snow-filled canyon that gradually opens into a vast mountain pass. It begins within a narrow corridor of high rock walls, where an armored character walks steadily forward through wind-blown snow particles under an orange dusk sky. As the character advances, the oppressive canyon walls recede and the terrain expands, shifting the perspective from an enclosed space to a wide-open vista. The scene then opens fully to reveal a broad mountain pass with new snow-covered ridges appearing in the distance. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory through the deepening snow toward the far-off mountain peaks beneath the glowing horizon.
